label: Challenge 3 - Base Layout
info: Base layout for IoT Challenge 3: ID generator, MQTT subscription, CSV dispatch, ZBEE_ZCL branch, Link Status branch, ThingSpeak branch and dashboard charts.

name: 1) Start here: init/reset CSV files and counters
info: Click this inject before running the challenge. It resets flow counters and rewrites CSV headers.

name: reset counters + CSV headers
2) ID generator: press Start, then every 1s -> MQTT publish + id_log.csv
info: Start generator enables generation. Stop generator disables it. Init/reset also disables generation.

name: set generator enabled
generate MQTT ID + CSV row
3) Subscriber: count 200 IDs, compute N, read challenge3.csv, classify packet
info: The CSV node must output one array message. If it outputs one message per row, change its mode in the node settings.

name: count <=200 + N=id%5218
select Packet Number N + classify
4) ZBEE_ZCL: publish to ZigBee/<device>, queue rate limit 10/min, then filtered_elems + charts
info: Topic must be ZigBee/<Device Name ZigBee Source>. Delay node must queue, not drop.

name: prepare ZBEE_ZCL MQTT payload
parse filtered attrs
5) Link Status: update final costs, preserve processing order in outgoing_cost.csv
info: Do not sort outgoing_cost.csv. Sort only later for ThingSpeak.

name: parse Link Status
6) After 200 IDs: smallest source, sort destinations hex, send costs to ThingSpeak every 20s
info: Put your ThingSpeak WRITE_API_KEY in the prepare function.

name: prepare ThingSpeak messages
